message:
fix(cli): slb check outputs human-readable text instead of Go map syntax

Previously, `slb check 'rm -rf /'` with default text output would print
Go map format: map[command:rm -rf / is_safe:false ...]

Now outputs human-readable format:
  Command:    rm -rf /
  Tier:       CRITICAL
  Safe:       false
  Approval:   true
  Min Approvals: 2
  Pattern:    ^rm\s+(-[rf]+\s+)+/($|\s)

JSON/YAML/TOON output modes continue to work as expected.

Fixes bd-ftan

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
